title: AltGameModesConfig
description: Config file for various tracker lines and in game text for alt game modes. Note that all lines in game need to be no more than 19 characters.

SpazerHuntGanonIntro.description: In game text for the intro to the Ganon battle

SpazerHuntGanonIntroGoalsNotMet.description: In game text for the intro to the Ganon battle when you have not collected enough spazers

SpazerHuntGanonGoalSign.description:
In game text for the sign on Ganon's pyramid to explain the goal 
{0} is a placeholder for the number of spazers needed to fight Ganon 
{1} is a placeholder for the number of spazers in the item pool

SpazerHuntGameStarted.description: Tracker line for when starting a new game

Possibility.description: Represents one possibility of a SchrodingersString.

Weight.description: Gets the weight associated with the item.

AdditionalLines.description: Additional lines to be stated after the initial line. Used for adding additional poses.
